title: NIT Goa Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate Posts
description: The National Institute of Technology, Goa (NIT Goa) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Electrical, Electronics Engineering can apply for the NIT Goa Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have ...
